items.title: Famous Libertarian Quotes
items.excerpt: If you are not free to choose wrongly and irresponsibly, you are not free at all. – Jacob Hornberger The magic of any effective system is the innovation that appears within the system. You cannot optimize a system without allowing for innovation within the system. Innovation is nothing but doing what hasn't been done in…

items.title: DUI Laws Forcing Unconstitutional Blood Draws
items.excerpt: Georgia is bumping up the creepy scale as it makes it's optional breathalyzer tests about as optional as taxes. The cops are using a refusal to submit to a breathalyzer as a reason to get a search warrant that allows them to forcibly draw blood. Bear in mind, this a misdemeanor that they're being…

items.title: The Free Market Failed (and other lessons Libertarians need to learn)
items.excerpt: Before loading your muskets I hope you give me the chance to explain. I'm more libertarian than most and this article is written with love and hope. Many libertarian's are frustrated at the government and what it does. They struggle day after day trying to come up with some political solution. They talk. They teach.…
